base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of powerup_invisible_potion — a pickup_item (health_pickup) from 1986 castlevania. Invisible Potion — 10s invincibility + sprite invisibility. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Invisible Potion — 10s invincibility + sprite invisibility; rare pickup in later levels
